summary: Completed frontend-only validation of UpliftiQ preview app and source/docs structure. Core UI flows passed: section rendering, transcript click-to-seek, timer reset visibility, and sign controls toggles.

minor_code_review_findings.issue: Interactive transcript buttons and video controls in package source do not expose data-testid attributes, reducing testability of package-level demos/consumers.
Slow/loop toggle buttons in package source do not expose data-testid attributes, reducing automated test robustness.
WebVTT fetch flow has no catch/error UI path; caption fetch/parse failures are silent and provide no user feedback.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to package-level interactive controls in caption-player and isl-tools components.
Add caption fetch error handling with user-visible fallback message for failed WebVTT load/parse.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking functional issues found in tested frontend preview flow.
Package source components should match project testability guideline by including data-testid on interactive elements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Used public URL from frontend/.env. Verified hero, packages, install, live demo, docs sections; transcript line click; timer reset; sign slow/loop toggles. No runtime error selectors found.
rca of the issue: No runtime failures observed during this iteration. Minor RCA: missing data-testid in package components is a testability gap due to components being authored without explicit QA hooks. Silent caption failures stem from missing fetch/parse error handling paths.
